Bash(python3 -c "
import zipfile
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

with zipfile.ZipFile\('UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm', 'r'\) as z:
    # Read workbook to get sheet names
    wb_xml = z.read\('xl/workbook.xml'\)
    root = ET.fromstring\(wb_xml\)
    ns = {'ns': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
    sheets = root.findall\('.//ns:sheet', ns\)
    print\('Sheet names:'\)
    for s in sheets:
        print\(f\\"  name={s.get\('name'\)}  sheetId={s.get\('sheetId'\)}  id={s.get\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}id'\)}\\"\)
")
Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm'\); print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(z.namelist\(\)\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook\('/home/muffy/work/personal_projects/habit_reward_tracker/UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm', keep_vba=True, data_only=True\)

def get_cell_value\(cell\):
    v = cell.value
    if v is None:
        return None
    return str\(v\).strip\(\) if str\(v\).strip\(\) != '' else None

def analyze_sheet\(ws\):
    rows_data = []
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(\):
        row_vals = [get_cell_value\(c\) for c in row]
        if any\(v is not None for v in row_vals\):
            rows_data.append\(row_vals\)
    return rows_data

def summarize_sheet\(name, ws\):
    print\(f"\\n{'='*70}"\)
    print\(f"SHEET: {name}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*70}"\)
    print\(f"  Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
    print\(f"  Max Row: {ws.max_row}, Max Col: {ws.max_column}"\)
    
    # Print merged cells
    if ws.merged_cells.ranges:
        print\(f"  Merged cell ranges: {len\(ws.merged_cells.ranges\)}"\)
    
    # Print all non-empty content, up to 200 rows
    print\(f"\\n  --- CONTENT \(non-empty rows\) ---"\)
    count = 0
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=min\(ws.max_row, 300\)\):
        row_vals = []
        for cell in row:
            v = cell.value
            if v is not None and str\(v\).strip\(\) != '':
                row_vals.append\(f"[Col {cell.column}\({cell.column_letter}\)]: {str\(v\).strip\(\)[:80]}"\)
        if row_vals:
            print\(f"  Row {row[0].row}: " + " | ".join\(row_vals\)\)
            count += 1
    if count == 0:
        print\("  \(no non-empty content found\)"\)
    print\(f"\\n  Total non-empty rows displayed: {count}"\)

for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    summarize_sheet\(sheet_name, ws\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook\('/home/muffy/work/personal_projects/habit_reward_tracker/UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm', keep_vba=True, data_only=True\)

def get_val\(cell\):
    v = cell.value
    if v is None:
        return None
    s = str\(v\).strip\(\)
    return s if s else None

# ---- Sheet 1: Alok HabitScoreCard ----
print\("="*70\)
print\("SHEET 1: Alok HabitScoreCard"\)
print\("="*70\)
ws = wb['Alok HabitScoreCard']
print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions} | Max row: {ws.max_row} | Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)

# Read first few rows to understand structure
print\("\\n--- HEADER ROWS \(rows 1-5\) ---"\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=5\):
    for cell in row:
        v = get_val\(cell\)
        if v:
            print\(f"  R{cell.row}C{cell.column}\({cell.column_letter}\): {v[:100]}"\)

print\("\\n--- SAMPLE DATA ROWS \(rows 6-20\) ---"\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=6, max_row=20\):
    row_vals = [\(cell.column_letter, str\(cell.value\)[:60]\) for cell in row if get_val\(cell\)]
    if row_vals:
        print\(f"  Row {row[0].row}: {row_vals}"\)

print\("\\n--- LAST 5 NON-EMPTY ROWS ---"\)
last_rows = []
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    row_vals = [\(cell.column_letter, str\(cell.value\)[:60]\) for cell in row if get_val\(cell\)]
    if row_vals:
        last_rows.append\(\(row[0].row, row_vals\)\)
for r in last_rows[-5:]:
    print\(f"  Row {r[0]}: {r[1]}"\)

# Get all unique column headers
print\("\\n--- ALL COLUMN HEADERS \(row 2\) ---"\)
for cell in ws[2]:
    v = get_val\(cell\)
    if v:
        print\(f"  Col {cell.column_letter}: {v[:100]}"\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook\('/home/muffy/work/personal_projects/habit_reward_tracker/UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm', keep_vba=True, data_only=True\)

def get_val\(cell\):
    v = cell.value
    if v is None:
        return None
    s = str\(v\).strip\(\)
    return s if s else None

# ---- Sheet 1: Alok HabitScoreCard - get remaining columns \(AH onwards\) and more rows ----
print\("="*70\)
print\("SHEET 1: Alok HabitScoreCard - remaining columns and row range"\)
print\("="*70\)
ws = wb['Alok HabitScoreCard']

# Headers row 2, cols AH onwards
print\("\\n--- COLUMNS AH onwards \(row 2\) ---"\)
for cell in ws[2]:
    if cell.column >= 34:  # AH = 34
        v = get_val\(cell\)
        if v:
            print\(f"  Col {cell.column_letter} \({cell.column}\): {v[:100]}"\)

# Row 3 units for those cols
print\("\\n--- UNITS ROW \(row 3\) for cols AH+ ---"\)
for cell in ws[3]:
    if cell.column >= 34:
        v = get_val\(cell\)
        if v:
            print\(f"  Col {cell.column_letter}: {v[:80]}"\)

# Check cols B and C
print\("\\n--- COLS B and C headers and first rows ---"\)
for row_idx in range\(1, 25\):
    row = ws[row_idx]
    for cell in row:
        if cell.column in [2, 3]:
            v = get_val\(cell\)
            if v:
                print\(f"  R{row_idx}C{cell.column_letter}: {v[:100]}"\)

# How many data rows are actually filled?
print\("\\n--- DATA ROW COUNT \(rows 19+, col A has dates\) ---"\)
date_rows = []
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=19, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    v = get_val\(row[0]\)  # col A
    if v and \('202' in v or '2021' in v or '2020' in v\):
        date_rows.append\(\(row[0].row, v\)\)
print\(f"  Total date rows: {len\(date_rows\)}"\)
if date_rows:
    print\(f"  First date: {date_rows[-1][1]} \(row {date_rows[-1][0]}\)"\)
    print\(f"  Last date: {date_rows[0][1]} \(row {date_rows[0][0]}\)"\)

# Check rows around 8-15 for special sections
print\("\\n--- ROWS 6-15 \(special sections\) ---"\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=6, max_row=15\):
    row_vals = [\(cell.column_letter, str\(cell.value\)[:80]\) for cell in row if get_val\(cell\)]
    if row_vals:
        print\(f"  Row {row[0].row}: {row_vals}"\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook\('/home/muffy/work/personal_projects/habit_reward_tracker/UltimateHabitTracker.xlsm', keep_vba=True, data_only=True\)

def get_val\(cell\):
    v = cell.value
    if v is None:
        return None
    s = str\(v\).strip\(\)
    return s if s else None

# ---- Sheet 3: Question Tracker - focused analysis ----
print\("="*70\)
print\("SHEET 3: Question Tracker - Focused Analysis"\)
print\("="*70\)
ws = wb['Question Tracker']
print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions} | Max row: {ws.max_row} | Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)

# Header row
print\("\\n--- COLUMN HEADERS \(row 1\) ---"\)
for cell in ws[1]:
    v = get_val\(cell\)
    if v:
        print\(f"  Col {cell.column_letter} \({cell.column}\): {v}"\)

# Stats
print\("\\n--- DATA ROWS sample \(rows 3-10\) ---"\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=12\):
    row_vals = [\(cell.column_letter, str\(cell.value\)[:70]\) for cell in row if get_val\(cell\)]
    if row_vals:
        print\(f"  Row {row[0].row}: {row_vals}"\)

# Count data rows
data_count = 0
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    if get_val\(row[0]\):
        data_count += 1
print\(f"\\n  Total data rows \(col A filled\): {data_count}"\)

# Unique values in col F \(Level\)
print\("\\n--- UNIQUE LEVELS \(col F\) ---"\)
levels = set\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    v = get_val\(row[5]\)  # col F = index 5
    if v:
        levels.add\(v\)
print\(f"  {sorted\(levels\)}"\)

# Topics in col L - unique values
print\("\\n--- UNIQUE TOPICS \(col L\) ---"\)
topics = set\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    if len\(row\) > 11:
        v = get_val\(row[11]\)  # col L = index 11
        if v:
            topics.add\(v\)
print\(f"  {sorted\(topics\)}"\)

# Col N - Progress unique values
print\("\\n--- UNIQUE PROGRESS values \(col N\) ---"\)
progress = set\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    if len\(row\) > 13:
        v = get_val\(row[13]\)  # col N = index 13
        if v:
            progress.add\(v\)
print\(f"  {sorted\(progress\)}"\)

# Last Q number
last_q = None
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=3, max_row=ws.max_row\):
    v = get_val\(row[0]\)
    if v:
        last_q = v
print\(f"\\n  Last Q number seen: {last_q}"\)

PYEOF)
